name: clickele
description: ClickEle is a leading manufacturer of magnetic components, power transformers, inductors, and power supplies for industrial, automotive, telecommunications, and consumer electronics applications.
longDescription: ClickEle (可立克科技) is a premier magnetic components and power solutions provider headquartered in Shenzhen, China. Founded in 1995, ClickEle has established itself as a trusted manufacturer of high-quality transformers, inductors, and power supplies for diverse applications. The company's comprehensive product portfolio includes high-frequency transformers, power inductors, EMI filters, current transformers, and custom magnetics. ClickEle products are known for their high efficiency, excellent thermal performance, and competitive pricing, serving customers in industrial power, automotive electronics, telecommunications, renewable energy, and consumer electronics. As an authorized ClickEle distributor, LiTong provides comprehensive technical support, application engineering services, and reliable supply chain solutions.

seoTitle: ClickEle Magnetic Components | Transformers, Inductors | LiTong
seoDescription: Authorized ClickEle distributor offering power transformers, inductors, current transformers, and EMI filters. Technical support and selection guide available.

faqs.question: Is LiTong an authorized ClickEle distributor?
faqs.answer: Yes, LiTong is an authorized distributor of ClickEle products. We provide genuine ClickEle magnetic components including power transformers, inductors, current transformers, and EMI filters. As an authorized distributor, we offer factory-direct pricing, technical support, application engineering services, and guaranteed authentic products with full warranty coverage.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team for ClickEle product inquiries, samples, and volume pricing. We can provide authorization certificates upon request.

faqs.question: What are ClickEle's core product categories?
faqs.answer: ClickEle specializes in magnetic components with four main product categories: (1) Power Transformers - high-frequency transformers for switching power supplies, DC-DC converters, and inverter applications; (2) Power Inductors - SMD and through-hole inductors for filtering, energy storage, and power conversion; (3) Current Transformers - precision current sensing transformers for power monitoring, protection, and metering; (4) EMI Filters - common mode chokes and EMI suppression filters for noise reduction. These products serve industrial power, automotive, telecommunications, and renewable energy markets.
faqs.decisionGuide: Browse our product categories to find specific ClickEle solutions for your application, or contact our FAE team for selection guidance.

faqs.question: How do ClickEle products compare to international brands?
faqs.answer: ClickEle products offer competitive performance compared to international brands: (1) Quality - ISO 9001 and IATF 16949 certified manufacturing; (2) Performance - efficiency up to 99%, low core losses, excellent thermal characteristics; (3) Certifications - UL, VDE, CE certified for global markets; (4) Cost - typically 20-40% lower cost than equivalent Pulse, Coilcraft, or Wurth products; (5) Customization - ability to design custom magnetics for specific applications; (6) Supply security - large manufacturing capacity with short lead times. Many customers have successfully replaced international brands with ClickEle for cost savings without compromising quality.
faqs.decisionGuide: Request cross-reference guides to compare ClickEle products with your current magnetic components.

faqs.question: What applications are ClickEle products suitable for?
faqs.answer: ClickEle products serve diverse applications: (1) Industrial power - switching power supplies, motor drives, welding equipment; (2) Automotive electronics - EV onboard chargers, DC-DC converters, BMS systems; (3) Telecommunications - base station power, network equipment, data centers; (4) Renewable energy - solar inverters, energy storage systems, wind power; (5) Consumer electronics - adapters, chargers, appliances; (6) Medical equipment - isolation transformers, power supplies. The product portfolio covers power levels from watts to kilowatts and frequencies up to MHz range.
faqs.decisionGuide: Identify your power requirements, frequency, and environmental conditions, then contact us for product recommendations.

faqs.question: What technical support does LiTong provide for ClickEle products?
faqs.answer: LiTong provides comprehensive technical support for ClickEle products including: (1) Product selection guidance based on your power, frequency, and size requirements; (2) Magnetic design consultation - core material selection, turns ratio, inductance calculations; (3) Thermal analysis - heat dissipation and temperature rise estimation; (4) EMI/EMC recommendations - filter design and noise suppression; (5) Custom design support - modifications for specific applications; (6) Cross-reference support for migrating from other brands. Our FAE team has deep expertise in magnetics design and power electronics.
faqs.decisionGuide: Submit your technical questions through our support portal or schedule a design review with our FAE team.

faqs.question: Does ClickEle offer automotive-grade products?
faqs.answer: Yes, ClickEle offers a comprehensive portfolio of AEC-Q200 qualified automotive-grade magnetic components: (1) Power transformers for onboard chargers and DC-DC converters; (2) Power inductors for automotive DC-DC applications; (3) Current transformers for battery management systems; (4) Common mode chokes for CAN bus and Ethernet. All automotive products are IATF 16949 certified and meet AEC-Q200 requirements for temperature, vibration, and reliability. PPAP documentation is available for automotive customers.
faqs.decisionGuide: For automotive applications, request AEC-Q200 certificates and PPAP documentation.

faqs.question: What is the typical lead time for ClickEle products?
faqs.answer: ClickEle product lead times vary by product type and order volume: (1) Standard catalog products: 2-4 weeks for sample quantities, 4-6 weeks for production volumes; (2) High-volume production: 6-8 weeks with scheduled deliveries; (3) Custom magnetics: 6-10 weeks for design and qualification. As an authorized distributor, LiTong maintains strategic inventory of popular ClickEle products to support urgent requirements and reduce lead times for key customers.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team for current lead times and inventory availability.
